item.title: Real-Time Multi-Vendor EtherCAT Motion Control (MCCL)
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: A real-time, multi-vendor EtherCAT motion control platform was developed to abstract vendor differences while ensuring deterministic, synchronized multi-axis motion.

item.title: Bio-Inspired Robots (Bionic Panda)
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: High-fidelity simulation and real-time control of a bio-inspired panda robot with torque control, MPC/WBC locomotion, and autonomous behaviors.

item.title: Four-Legged Robot Platform
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: Design and development of a real-time, torque-controlled quadruped robot using EtherCAT, model-based control, and MPC.

item.title: Autonomous Mobile Robot (AMR) for Indoor Environments
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: Design, construction, and control of an indoor autonomous mobile robot combining academic research and industrial ROS-based implementations.

item.title: Automated Satellite Antenna Tracking System
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: Automated satellite antenna tracking system with high-precision control, redundancy, and real-time feedback.

item.title: Deep Learning-Driven Robotic Plastic Waste Sorter
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: A high-speed robotic system for real-time plastic waste detection, classification, and picking using YOLOv4 and delta robot control.

item.title: Robotic Grasping Using Evolutionary Deep Neural Networks
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: AI-based robotic grasping system combining deep neural networks and evolutionary optimization for robust object grasp estimation.

item.title: Robotic Controllers & Vision-Guided Manipulation
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: Development of real-time robotic controllers integrating forward/inverse kinematics, EtherCAT motion control, and AI-based object detection for industrial manipulation.

item.title: Smart Tuning Technology
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: Smart Tuning Technology automates controller and servo driver tuning using optimization algorithms and sensor feedback, enabling fast and reliable parameter tuning across platforms.

item.title: Intelligent AR/VR Robot Arm Teaching Technology
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: AR/VR-based virtual robot arm teaching system with millimeter accuracy using digital twin technology.
